mentalhealthtalksindia
 262w
We aren't perfect and there is absolutely no need to pretend that we are. All of us make mistakes and err more than we would like to admit. It is completely okay and rather healthy to acknowledge our shortcomings and behavioural patterns and work on them. It is self-care in action. It can be quite difficult but it is absolutely important! Having shortcomings is not a bad thing. Not at all. It is what makes us human. What do you think about this form of self-care? 💛

Very well said! Holding yourself accountable means you manage your work and life tasks, fulfil your obligations to colleagues, and consistently self-reflect on your work conduct.
So well said! Accepting that there is need for growth is the first step on the growth journey 🙌🙌❤️❤️
Indeed. A great way to see self care as not just pampering yourself 👏
Yes! Self care is all about acknowledging the good, the bad & the ugly
Posting dialogues is easy.... Dealing with it... Is difficult

I was suffering from anxiety due to this pandemic but after consulting with psychologist at @amor.healthcareservices . Within 6 sessions , I am feeling better and living my life with full of joy . Amor is best and also they do online consultation so i did not need to go out for this consultation.
